description.ko: 유기적 식물학과 디지털 건축의 숨막히는 합성으로, 내부 데이터 스트림과 함께 빛나는 맥동하는 광섬유 수술과 반투명한 크리스털 잎을 가진 꽃들이 특징입니다.
description.en: A breathtaking synthesis of organic botany and digital architecture, featuring flowers with pulsing fiber-optic stamens and translucent crystalline leaves that glow with internal data streams.

prompt: A high-tech digital botanical garden, bioluminescent flowers with integrated circuit board patterns on petals, glowing fiber-optic vines, holographic pollen particles, deep velvet blue and neon cyan lighting, 8k resolution, photorealistic, surreal fusion of nature and technology.
